systems.name: OpenCode Daemon HTTP Surface
systems.description: The bun daemon process that serves /api/v2 HTTP endpoints to TUI, webapp, and admin panel clients.

containers.name: Daemon HTTP Server
containers.description: Hono-based request pipeline inside the bun daemon.

containers.name: In-Process Bus
containers.description: Cross-module event bus; cross-process events from worker are bridged here via publishBridgedEvent.

containers.name: Session Storage
containers.description: Filesystem-backed storage for session metadata and message parts.

containers.name: Ops Config Surface
containers.description: Static tunables file consumed at daemon startup.

components.name: Session Cache
components.description: In-process LRU keyed by session:<id> / messages:<id>:<limit>; TTL and LRU cap controlled by tweaks.

components.name: Cache Invalidation Subscriber
components.description: Subscribes to MessageV2.Event.* and Session.Event.*; drops affected cache keys and bumps per-session version counter.

components.name: ETag Evaluator
components.description: Middleware inside routes/session.ts computing weak ETag and short-circuiting 304 responses.

components.name: Rate Limit Middleware
components.description: Token bucket per (username, method, routePattern); returns 429 with Retry-After.

components.name: Cache Health Route
components.description: GET /api/v2/server/cache/health endpoint; reads cache and rate-limit stats.

components.name: Tweaks Loader
components.description: Parses /etc/opencode/tweaks.cfg; emits startup log with effective values; logs warnings on parse errors.

components.name: Worker Bus Bridge
components.description: Existing publishBridgedEvent function that relays worker-process events into the daemon bus.

components.name: Session Storage Reader
components.description: Existing Session.get / Session.messages / MessageV2.stream functions that remain the fallback loader.

relationships.label: Forwards allowed request to ETag check
